sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98046" key="su/gxwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύγ-χωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n98046.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">filling up</tr_> of trenches, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:16:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.2</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.); prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σύγχυσιν</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.434c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
